name: JellyTag (STRM + Overlays)
overview: Quality badges with .strm parsing, gradient overlays & ratings
description: JellyTag automatically overlays quality badges on your media posters and thumbnails. This fork adds .strm file support and Kometa-style gradient overlays. Features: gradient backgrounds (different for Movies vs TV), combined resolution/HDR/audio badges, audience rating badges with color coding. Extracts metadata from filenames like 'Movie (2012) [Remux-2160p HEVC DV HDR10 TrueHD Atmos 7.1].strm'. Badges are rendered server-side and visible on all Jellyfin clients.

versions.changelog:
Added gradient overlays and ratings:
- Gradient backgrounds (different for Movies vs TV Shows)
- Combined Kometa-style badges (DV-HDR-TrueHD-Atmos, etc.)
- Audience rating badges with color coding
- Enable via 'Use Kometa Style' in plugin settings
- All previous .strm parsing features included

Fork with .strm file support:
- Added FileNameParser for .strm filename metadata extraction
- Extracts resolution, HDR, codec, audio from filenames like [Remux-2160p HEVC DV HDR10 TrueHD Atmos 7.1]
- Supports AMZN, DSNP, HMAX, NF streaming service tags
- Falls back to standard metadata if filename parsing fails
- Based on JellyTag v2.0.2.0
Fix: exclude SkiaSharp native assets that caused plugin loading crash, pin Jellyfin packages to 10.11.0 for full 10.11.x compatibility
